products.title: Lumière Noir
products.subtitle: Velvet Nightfall in a Flame
products.description_html:
As twilight descends, the mystique of Lumière Noir envelops your senses, transporting you to a realm of sophisticated elegance. This exquisite soy candle, infused with the dark, resinous essence of Sandalwood and Oud, casts a spell of refinement and poise. The matte-black jar, adorned with understated luxury, adds a touch of mystery to any room, creating an ambiance that is as enchanting as it is alluring. With each flicker, the warmth and depth of this scented masterpiece unfold, inviting you to surrender to the allure of the night.

Whether you seek to create a dramatic backdrop for an evening gathering or simply wish to indulge in a moment of solitude, Lumière Noir promises to be your constant companion, its fragrance evolving with the passing hours, a true testament to the art of perfumery. Let the shadows dance, and the night bloom, as you bask in the radiant glow of this luminary creation.
bullet_features: Handcrafted with high-quality soy wax for a clean burn
Sandalwood and Oud essential oils for a rich, dark fragrance
Matte-black jar adds a touch of modern sophistication
Burns for approximately 40 hours, providing long-lasting ambiance
Perfect for creating a dramatic evening atmosphere

seo_meta_tags.title: Lumière Noir Candle
seo_meta_tags.description: Sandalwood & Oud scented candle for evening ambiance

products.title: Lumière Blanc
products.subtitle: Morning Light in a Gentle Glow
products.description_html:
Lumière Blanc embodies the essence of a new beginning, a fresh canvas waiting to be filled with the vibrant hues of life. This beautifully crafted soy candle, infused with the uplifting blend of White Tea and Bergamot, is designed to awaken your senses and set the tone for a day filled with promise. Presented in an elegant ivory ceramic jar with a gold lid, it adds a touch of sophistication and warmth to any room, creating an ambiance that is as inviting as the first light of dawn.

As the soft, golden flame dances, the citrusy freshness of Bergamot mingles with the delicate, floral nuances of White Tea, crafting a scent that is at once calming and invigorating. Whether you seek to enhance your morning ritual or simply wish to bathe your space in a soothing, serene light, Lumière Blanc is the perfect accompaniment, its gentle glow and uplifting fragrance combining to create a truly enchanting experience.
bullet_features: Handcrafted with premium soy wax for a clean, even burn
White Tea and Bergamot essential oils for a fresh, uplifting scent
Ivory ceramic jar with gold lid adds a touch of luxury
Burns for approximately 30 hours, providing a long-lasting ambiance
Ideal for morning meditation or as a calming desk companion

seo_meta_tags.title: Lumière Blanc Candle
seo_meta_tags.description: White Tea & Bergamot scented candle for morning

products.title: La Nuit Gift Set
products.subtitle: A Midnight Bouquet of Dreams
products.description_html:
La Nuit Gift Set is a carefully curated collection of two exquisite soy candles, each embodying the essence of the night in its own unique way. This luxurious gift set, presented in a sleek, magnetic velvet box, is designed to transport the senses to a realm of mystery and allure, making it the perfect offering for those who appreciate the finer things in life. The first candle, Rose Jasmine, weaves a spell of enchantment with its heady, floral bouquet, while the second, Cedarwood Vetiver, grounds the senses with its earthy, woody depth.

Whether you seek to indulge a loved one or wish to treat yourself to a little luxury, La Nuit Gift Set promises to be a thoughtful and elegant gesture. The candles, each with its distinct character, can be enjoyed separately or together, creating a layered, complex fragrance that is as captivating as the night itself. As the soft glow of the flames dances across the room, the boundaries between reality and fantasy blur, and the magic of the night unfolds.
bullet_features: Two unique scented candles: Rose Jasmine and Cedarwood Vetiver
Handcrafted with high-quality soy wax for a clean burn
Presented in a luxurious, magnetic velvet gift box
Each candle burns for approximately 20 hours
Perfect as a gift for special occasions or as a personal indulgence

seo_meta_tags.title: La Nuit Gift Set
seo_meta_tags.description: Luxury scented candle gift set for special occasions

collection.title: The Signature Collection
collection.description_html: Step into a world of refined elegance with Lumière's The Signature Collection, where handcrafted soy candles weave a tapestry of warmth and sophistication. Each candle is a masterful blend of exquisite fragrances, carefully crafted to transport you to a realm of serenity and poise. As the soft, golden light dances across your space, it whispers tales of luxury and refinement, inviting you to indulge in the beauty of the everyday.
collection.seo_description: Experience luxury with Lumière's handcrafted soy candles, expertly blending fragrances for a refined ambiance.

about_us.headline: Where Ancient Wisdom Meets Modern Luxury
about_us.body_html: In the Himalayas, ancient traditions and modern science converge. Lumière's journey began with a passion for harnessing rare herbs and essential oils to craft luxurious, 100% organic candles.
about_us.founder_note: Illuminating spaces, one candle at a time.

seo.homepage_title: Lumière — Premium Handcrafted Soy Candles India
seo.homepage_description: Discover Lumière's collection of luxury handcrafted soy candles. Natural, artisan-poured, beautifully packaged. Premium home fragrance for the modern Indian woman.
seo.og_description: Handcrafted soy candles for the modern luxury home. Explore Lumière's Signature Collection.

color_palette.rationale: Deep noir anchors the brand in immediate luxury and creates dramatic contrast with champagne gold. The gold evokes candlelight itself — thematic coherence. Ivory backgrounds give an editorial gallery-white quality. Taupe provides warmth in body copy without competing with the primary text hierarchy.

display.name: Cormorant Garamond
display.use: Hero headlines, product names, section titles, pull quotes
display.rationale: High-contrast thin-thick strokes of refined luxury brands (Hermès, Vogue). The 300 italic at large sizes creates airy luxury. Competes with Aesop and The Row globally.

body.name: Jost
body.use: Navigation, body copy, buttons, captions, price tags
body.rationale: Geometric sans-serif with refined letter-spacing. Clean and modern without coldness. Pairs beautifully with Cormorant by contrast without competition.

accent.name: Italiana
accent.rationale: Italian-influenced serif with dramatic stroke contrast. Reserved for moments of maximum elegance.

typography.pairing_note: The Cormorant/Jost pairing is used by Mejuri, Coterie, and other top luxury DTC brands globally. Cormorant carries heritage and emotion; Jost carries precision and legibility.
